description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized, seated human figure with an elongated, abstract form, cast in a dark, weathered metal. The figure sits cross-legged atop a rectangular stone pedestal, with one arm resting on the knee and the other draped casually to the side. The surface of the figure is textured, showing patina and signs of age, while the pedestal features visible graffiti on its front face. The base is set on a square section of concrete or stone tiles, suggesting an outdoor installation. The overall posture and expression of the figure convey a sense of calm contemplation. The sculpture's minimalist yet expressive design makes it a striking focal point in its urban setting.
description: A weathered metal sculpture of a seated, cross-legged human figure atop a stone pedestal, set on tiled pavement. The figure is abstract and elongated, with a textured surface and graffiti on the pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, cross-legged posture, and graffiti on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, arm position, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, shoulders, and the unadorned back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's other profile and the pedestal's side texture.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved surface, likely in a public urban space such as a plaza or park.
